steps.title: Introduce the list of ways
steps.content: The sentence says the US Geological Survey compiles data in several ways, then lists three by phrases: exchanging information, linking maps, and maintaining a database. A colon can introduce that explanatory list.

steps.title: Avoid fragment punctuation
steps.content: Choice A creates a sentence fragment beginning with By. Choice C uses a semicolon before phrases that are not an independent clause. Choice D places a colon after the preposition by, which is ungrammatical. The answer is B.
